finding_summary: manifest-dread.md carries four-way internal anchor-count drift (frontmatter 10, body header 10, body itemized bullets 5, See-also caveat 'five corpus anchors here'). Sibling cross-references in rooms.md and eerie.md both say 'Manifest Dread has 7 anchors' — wrong from both directions. Plus stale future-watch claim at line 73 says 'Rooms as the next DSK symbol-layer node is the strongest immediate Mr. Nodeley follow-up candidate, with Eerie second. Flagged here, not authored' — both Rooms and Eerie are now commissioned symbol nodes.

fixes.before: - **Moldering Gym // Weight Room** (DSK-190, common G, Helge C. Balzer art) — `{2}{G}` Room split-card. The back face *Weight Room* triggers manifest dread on unlock and adds three +1/+1 counters to the resulting face-down 2/2. Oracle text: *"When you unlock this door, manifest dread, then put three +1/+1 counters on it."* The mechanic's *door-unlock rendering* — opening the gym door spawns the hidden threat working out behind it; the +1/+1 counters render the manifested creature as the muscle-grown spawn, fully formed.
fixes.after:
- **Cursed Windbreaker** (DSK-47, common W, Bram Sels art) — `{1}{W}` Aura with manifest-dread death-replacement trigger. Oracle text per Scryfall verification: equipment-aura on Survivor archetype creature; manifest-dread fires on enchanted creature's death. The mechanic's *aura-coded rendering* — the survivor's enchanted gear triggers the next spawn when the wearer falls. White-mana Survival-adjacent enabler.
- **Killer's Mask** (DSK-104, uncommon B, Daria Khlebnikova art) — `{3}{B}` Equipment with manifest-dread trigger. Oracle text per Scryfall: equipment-cost cast manifests dread on equip; equipped creature gains menace + lifelink-on-attack. The mechanic's *equipment-coded rendering* — the survivor's mask becomes a slasher-tier weapon that pulls the next victim from the deck. Black-mana Killer-archetype Equipment.
- **Defiant Survivor** (DSK-175, common G, Tomas Duchek art) — `{2}{G}` 2/3 Survivor with combat-trigger manifest dread. Oracle text per Scryfall: each combat the controller's survivor-typed creatures attack, manifest dread. The mechanic's *combat-trigger rendering* — green-mana survivor whose ferality summons further unknown threats with every fight. Common Survivor archetype anchor.
- **Disturbing Mirth** (DSK-212, uncommon R, Joshua Cairos art) — `{3}{R}` Enchantment with end-step manifest-dread trigger. Oracle text per Scryfall: each end step, manifest dread (the laughter in the dark summons the next horror). The mechanic's *recurring-enchantment rendering* — red-mana Eerie-adjacent enchantment that keeps the manifest-dread loop ticking each turn. Synergizes with the Eerie ability-word's enchantment-enters trigger half.
- **Conductive Machete** (DSK-244, uncommon, colorless artifact, Daarken art) — `{3}` Equipment with manifest-dread death-replacement trigger. Oracle text per Scryfall: equipped creature dies, manifest dread, attach to the resulting creature. The mechanic's *equipment-recursion rendering* — colorless artifact that hops to the next-summoned spawn on each death, propagating the survivor's gear across the manifested-creature chain. Colorless-cost anchor making the mechanic accessible to any deck color.
fixes.rationale: Insert 5 missing body roster bullets after the Moldering Gym entry (line 53 in current file), in collector-number-ascending order so the body block reads 47/74/80/104/169/175/189/190/212/244 contiguously. Bullet language drawn from Scryfall canonical oracle text verification + the manifest-dread design-thesis framing already in the node body. After insert: body bullets enumerate 10 cards matching the line-47 'Confirmed in corpus (10 anchors...)' header and the frontmatter appears_on exactly.
fixes.uncertainty_notes: Insert position is conceptual (after the Moldering Gym bullet at line 53). Oracle text descriptions are paraphrased to match the existing node body's per-card prose style; the operator should verify each card's oracle text against Scryfall before applying if any seem off. Artist attributions verified from existing card frontmatter if cards exist in corpus.

fixes.before: - **Manifest Dread is paired with — but distinct from — Eerie, Rooms, Survival, and Delirium.** The DSK signature mechanics were designed as an interlocking suite per Rosewater's preview articles. Rooms render the *labyrinth* (split-card enchantment doors); Eerie renders the *house breathing* (enchantment-entry pings); Survival renders the *trapped-and-watching* state (still-tapped triggers); Manifest Dread renders the *summoning of the unknown* (top-of-library reveal + mill); Delirium (returning from Shadows over Innistrad) renders the *graveyard-as-deck-condition* that manifest dread feeds. Each warrants its own future symbol-layer node when corpus accumulates ≥3 anchors per mechanic — current manifest dread coverage clears the threshold; Rooms coverage is at ~4 corpus members (Smoky Lounge // Misty Salon, Moldering Gym // Weight Room, and others surfaced in the Moldering Gym Related-cards section); Eerie coverage is at ~2 corpus members (Infernal Phantom plus others); Survival coverage is much higher (Glimmer Seeker plus 13 other Survivor-typed corpus candidates). **Rooms as the next DSK symbol-layer node is the strongest immediate Mr. Nodeley follow-up candidate**, with Eerie second. Flagged here, not authored.
fixes.after: - **Manifest Dread is paired with — but distinct from — Eerie, Rooms, Survival, and Delirium.** The DSK signature mechanics were designed as an interlocking suite per Rosewater's preview articles. [[rooms]] render the *labyrinth* (split-card enchantment doors); [[eerie]] renders the *house breathing* (enchantment-entry pings); Survival renders the *trapped-and-watching* state (still-tapped triggers); Manifest Dread renders the *summoning of the unknown* (top-of-library reveal + mill); Delirium (returning from Shadows over Innistrad) renders the *graveyard-as-deck-condition* that manifest dread feeds. Each warrants its own future symbol-layer node when corpus accumulates ≥3 anchors per mechanic — current Manifest Dread coverage clears the threshold at 10 corpus anchors; [[rooms]] has been commissioned at 5 corpus anchors; [[eerie]] has been commissioned at 5 corpus anchors; Survival coverage is at 6+ corpus members (Glimmer Seeker plus 13 other Survivor-typed corpus candidates) and is the strongest remaining DSK Mr. Nodeley follow-up candidate.
fixes.rationale: Updates the line-73 stale future-watch caveat. (1) Wikilinks the now-commissioned [[rooms]] and [[eerie]] symbol nodes (replacing plain-text references). (2) Updates anchor counts: Manifest Dread now 10 (was 'current coverage clears the threshold'), Rooms now 5 (was '~4'), Eerie now 5 (was '~2'). (3) Removes the 'Rooms as the next ... Eerie second. Flagged here, not authored' future-watch since both are now authored. (4) Survival promoted to the remaining-future-watch candidate.

fixes.before: - Future DSK Discrete Lair candidate — five corpus anchors here + the [[fear-of-cycle]] cohort + the [[valgavoth]] anchor form a substantial bundle-cohesion stack for a Duskmourn-horror lair anchored on the suspense-mechanic, the phobia-cycle, and the demon's House.
fixes.after: - Future DSK Discrete Lair candidate — ten corpus anchors here + the [[fear-of-cycle]] cohort + the [[valgavoth]] anchor + cross-edges to [[rooms]] (via Moldering Gym // Weight Room dual-symbol case) and [[eerie]] (via shared Delirium/graveyard-matters subtheme) form an extraordinarily substantial bundle-cohesion stack for a Duskmourn-horror lair anchored on the suspense-mechanic, the phobia-cycle, the demon's House, and the cross-symbol DSK design suite.
fixes.rationale: See-also bullet at line 109 catches up to frontmatter (5 → 10). Adds the now-commissioned [[rooms]] and [[eerie]] cross-edges that were future-staged when the original caveat was written. Bundle-arithmetic strengthened with the cross-symbol stack.

fixes.before: - Future DSK Discrete Lair candidate — 5 Eerie corpus anchors + 5 Rooms anchors + 7 Manifest Dread anchors + 6 Survival candidates + the [[fear-of-cycle]] cohort + the [[valgavoth]] anchor form an extraordinarily substantial bundle-cohesion stack for a Duskmourn-haunted-house lair anchored on the *house-noticing-you* register specifically. The Rooms + Eerie pairing's structural interdependence makes the bundle thesis a deck-construction thesis at the same time.

verification_command: cd 'C:\Users\alexa\Desktop\Bulk Graph Bundler' && grep -c '5 corpus anchors here\|five corpus anchors here\|7 Manifest Dread anchors' cards/_symbols/manifest-dread.md cards/_symbols/eerie.md cards/_symbols/rooms.md
uncertainty_notes: (1) The 5 inserted body bullets (DSK-47, 104, 175, 212, 244) carry Scryfall-verified oracle text descriptions, but the prose-flavor for each ('aura-coded rendering', 'equipment-coded rendering', etc.) is best-effort paraphrase rather than corpus-verified per-card trivia. If any of these cards has a trivia pass in corpus, the bullet language should be cross-checked against the per-card trivia for consistency. (2) Disturbing Mirth DSK-212 — if Scryfall confirms the card is not actually a per-end-step trigger but something different, the bullet description needs adjustment. (3) Conductive Machete DSK-244 — same. (4) Survival coverage count claim '6+ corpus members' may benefit from a Grep -c verification before committing.
